content.text:
I've read the instructions. I understand this is attempt #6+ and why previous attempts failed - context compression causing loss of critical constraints, hallucination of wrong packages (especially @blueprintjs instead of PatternFly), executing without permission, trusting tests over visual verification, and using stale training data.

My first action will be to **read `./progress.txt` and `./features.json`** to understand the current state before doing anything else. This follows the harness protocol.

Should I proceed?
